name: Lying Triceps Extension (Skull Crusher)
setup: Lie flat on bench, grip EZ bar at shoulder width
Press bar to arms extended above shoulders
execution: Lower bar toward forehead by bending elbows (90 degrees)
Elbows point to ceiling, upper arms stay vertical
Extend back up by contracting triceps
cues: Elbows to the sky, don't let them move
Lower to your eyes/forehead, not your chin
